summary: Added semester switching to auto-scheduling page. Scheduler UI now uses SemesterSelector + useSemesterStore. Preview sends selected semesterId. Configs/lockable slots scoped by semester. New readiness API shows data status per semester. Backend was already semester-aware; gap was frontend only.
uiChanges: scheduler-content.tsx: readiness display (counts, blockers, warnings, canPreview)
scheduler-content.tsx: preview body includes semesterId: currentSemesterId
scheduler-content.tsx: lockable slots fetched with withSemesterQuery
scheduler-content.tsx: both lockable slots and readiness re-load on semester change
scheduler-content.tsx: page state resets on semester change
apiChanges: Preview POST body now includes semesterId (backend already accepted it)
backendChanges: none — all backend APIs were already semester-aware

semesterScoping.preview: body.semesterId (UI sends selected semester; falls back to active)
semesterScoping.apply: previewRun.semesterId from DB record (safe, no external input)
semesterScoping.rollback: applyRun.semesterId from DB record (safe, no external input)

crossSemesterSafety.selectedSemesterMismatchHandling: apply/rollback derive from run record, not from UI state

verification.lint: 334 (185/149) — error count same as baseline, +3 warnings

knownLimitations: run history page (/admin/scheduler/history) does not have semester selector
current DB has only one active semester with TeachingTask data
